scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.dev:restart: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\\free-dev-ports.ps1 && concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
